item.title: 苹果官宣 WWDC26，定档 6 月 9 日
item.guid: 苹果官宣-WWDC26，定档-6-月-9-日
item.description:
Early this morning, Apple announced that its annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) will be held online from June 9th to 13th Beijing time, bringing together developers from around the world for an exciting week of connection, exploration, and innovation. 今天凌晨，苹果宣布将于北京时间 6 月 9 日至 13 日在线举行年度全球开发者大会（WWDC），汇聚来自全球各地的开发者，共度联结、探索和创新的精彩一周。

In addition to the online experience, developers and students will also have the opportunity to participate in a special in-person event at Apple Park on the opening day of the conference. 除了在线体验，开发者与学生还将有机会于大会开幕当天参与在 Apple Park 举办的线下特别活动。

WWDC26 will focus on updates to Apple's major platforms, including AI advancements , new systems/software, and developer tools. WWDC will also provide exclusive opportunities to communicate with Apple engineers and designers, as well as deep insights into new tools, frameworks, and features. WWDC26 将聚焦苹果各大平台的更新，包括 AI 进展 、新系统/软件与开发者工具。WWDC 还将提供与苹果工程师和设计师沟通的独家机会，以及对新工具、框架和功能的深度洞察。

item.title: 影石创始人回应大疆起诉
item.guid: 影石创始人回应大疆起诉
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, DJI Innovations recently officially sued Insta360 in the Shenzhen Intermediate People's Court. The case involves 6 patent ownership disputes, with multiple former DJI core R&D personnel allegedly involved. The patents in question mainly focus on key technical areas such as drone flight control, structural design, and image processing. 据界面新闻报道，大疆创新近日在深圳市中级人民法院正式起诉影石创新，案件涉及 6 项专利权属纠纷，多名前大疆核心研发人员被指参与，涉案专利主要集中在无人机飞行控制、结构设计、影像处理等关键技术领域。

DJI stated in the complaint that the relevant patents were inventions created by former employees within one year of their departure, and are closely related to the work tasks they undertook during their tenure at DJI. According to the relevant provisions of the "Patent Law of the People's Republic of China" regarding service inventions, the right to apply for the patents should belong to DJI. 大疆在诉状中指出，相关专利系前员工离职后一年内作出的发明创造，与其在大疆任职期间承担的工作任务密切相关，依据《中华人民共和国专利法》关于职务发明的相关规定，专利申请权应归大疆所有。

The core point of contention in the case lies in the differing disclosure of inventor identities. 案件的核心争议点，在于发明人身份的披露差异。

According to informed sources, in two patents related to drone flight control and structural design, Insta360 listed one of the inventors as "request not to disclose name" in the Chinese application text. 据知情人士透露，影石在涉及无人机飞行控制和结构设计的两件专利中，于中国申请文本里将其中一位发明人记载为「请求不公布姓名」。

However, in the corresponding international patent applications, the inventor's real name was fully listed. DJI pointed out in the complaint that this person is a former DJI core R&D personnel who deeply participated in the technical development of key DJI drone projects and mastered the core technical system during their employment. 然而在对应的国际专利申请中，该发明人的真实姓名却被完整列明。大疆在诉状中指出，此人正是前大疆核心研发人员，在职期间深度参与了大疆无人机重点项目的技术开发，掌握核心技术体系。

In response, Insta360 founder Liu Jingkang posted a detailed reply on Weibo yesterday. He stated: 对此，影石创始人刘靖康昨日在微博发文逐条回应。他表示：

    Existing evidence shows that the patents in question are all results of independent innovation by employees after joining Insta360, and did not originate from DJI;

    Regarding the matter of hiding inventors in domestic applications, he explained that Insta360's usual practice is to hide inventors in domestic applications and disclose them in PCT applications. The purpose is to delay the exposure of technical personnel lists and avoid being targeted by headhunters, and such operations are not limited to former DJI employees;

    Insta360's statistics found that multiple functions of DJI's panoramic cameras and thumb cameras have fallen within the protection scope of approximately 28 Insta360 patents, but Insta360 chose not to actively sue, prioritizing investment of resources into R&D.

He also revealed that Insta360 plans to launch 7 or 8 new products this year, including gimbal cameras, lavalier microphones, and another drone. 他还透露，影石今年计划推出 7、8 款新产品，包括云台相机、领夹麦克风和另一架无人机。

item.title: 小米汽车同时冠名三大顶级场地赛事
item.guid: 小米汽车同时冠名三大顶级场地赛事
item.description:
Xiaomi Auto announced yesterday that it has simultaneously sponsored three top domestic automotive circuit events: the China Touring Car Championship, the China Supercar Championship, and the China Endurance Championship. The signing ceremony has been successfully completed. 小米汽车昨日宣布，已同时冠名中国汽车场地职业联赛、中国超级跑车锦标赛、中国汽车耐力锦标赛三大国内顶级汽车场地赛事，签约仪式已顺利完成。

Xiaomi stated that it will continue to be rooted in the racing track, make long-term investments, and "do this thing seriously". 小米方面表示，将持续扎根赛道、长期投入，「把这件事情认真做下去」。

item.title: 小鹏汽车成立 Robotaxi 业务部，今年下半年开启载客示范运营
item.guid: 小鹏汽车成立-Robotaxi-业务部，今年下半年开启载客示范运营
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, XPeng Motors officially established its Robotaxi business unit yesterday, with Yuan Tingting appointed as the organizational head. It has two secondary departments: the Product Group and the Project Integration Group, responsible for overall product definition and business design, and overall project advancement and cross-system collaboration, respectively. 据财联社报道，小鹏汽车于昨日正式成立 Robotaxi 业务部，袁婷婷出任组织负责人，下设产品组与项目集成组两大二级部门，分别负责整体产品定义及业务设计、整体项目推进及跨系统协同。

XPeng Motors pointed out in the announcement that with the official release of the second-generation VLA, "the turning point of the fully autonomous driving era has arrived." The establishment of the Robotaxi business unit aims to accelerate the development of related businesses from 0 to 1, support the construction of scaled operational capabilities, and gradually achieve the goal of full unmanned operation. 小鹏汽车在公告中指出，随着第二代 VLA 正式发布，「全自动驾驶时代的拐点已经到来」，成立 Robotaxi 业务部旨在推动相关业务从 0 到 1 加速发展，支撑规模化运营能力建设及全无人目标的逐步达成。

At the organizational structure level, in February this year, XPeng Motors merged its Autonomous Driving Center and Smart Cockpit Center to form the "General Intelligence Center," focusing on building a unified underlying technology platform. The establishment of the Robotaxi business unit this time is a key deployment aimed at accelerating commercial implementation at the application layer. 在组织架构层面，今年 2 月，小鹏汽车已将自动驾驶中心与智能座舱中心合并，成立「通用智能中心」，主攻技术底层的统一基座建设；此次 Robotaxi 业务部的设立，则是面向应用层加速商业落地的关键部署。

item.title: 曝扎克伯格正打造 CEO Agent 替自己干活
item.guid: 曝扎克伯格正打造-CEO-Agent-替自己干活
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is building a personalized AI agent for himself to assist with his daily management tasks. 据《华尔街日报》报道，Meta CEO 扎克伯格正在为自己打造一款专属 AI 智能体，用于辅助其日常管理工作。

This tool, dubbed "CEO Agent," is currently still under development, and its main function is to help Zuckerberg access information more quickly. 这款工具被称为「CEO Agent」，目前仍处于开发阶段，主要功能是帮助扎克伯格更快速地获取信息。

The report states that currently, the use of AI tools has rapidly become widespread within Meta, and has even been incorporated into the employee performance appraisal system. According to informed sources, Meta's internal forums are full of posts from employees sharing AI use cases and self-built AI tools. 报道称，目前，AI 工具的使用已在 Meta 内部迅速普及，甚至已被纳入员工绩效考核体系。据知情人士透露，Meta 内部论坛上充满了员工分享 AI 使用案例和自建 AI 工具的帖子。

At the specific tool level, employees have started using a personal AI agent called "My Claw." This tool can access chat records and work files, and communicate on behalf of employees with colleagues (or colleagues' agents). There even exists an exclusive internal group where employees' personal AI agents interact with each other. 在具体工具层面，员工已开始使用名为「My Claw」的个人智能体，该工具可访问聊天记录和工作文件，并代表员工与同事（或同事的 Agent）进行沟通。内部甚至存在一个员工个人智能体相互交流的专属群组。

item.title: 苹果地图或加搜索广告
item.guid: 苹果地图或加搜索广告
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is planning to introduce search ad features into its native Maps app, with a related announcement possibly coming as early as this month. 据彭博社报道，苹果正计划在自带地图中引入搜索广告功能，相关公告最早或于本月发布。

According to informed sources, the advertising system operates similarly to Google Maps' ad model, allowing retailers and brands to bid for ad placements based on users' search terms. When users search for relevant content, the highest bidder will appear at the top of the results list. 据知情人士透露，该广告系统的运作方式与 Google 地图的广告模式类似，允许零售商和品牌针对用户的搜索词竞价广告位。当用户搜索相关内容时，出价最高的广告主将出现在结果列表顶部。

According to current plans, in-map advertisements will be launched as early as this summer on devices like iPhones and on the web. Previously, Apple had added multiple ad slots within the App Store and introduced ad monetization through Major League Soccer subscription packages on the Apple TV platform. 按照目前的计划，地图内的广告最早将于今年夏天在 iPhone 等设备以及网页端上线。此前，苹果已在 App Store 内新增了多个广告位，并通过 Apple TV 平台上的美国职业足球大联盟订阅套餐引入广告变现。

item.title: OPPO Find 系列负责人换帅，卓世杰接棒周意保主导 4 月旗舰发布
item.guid: OPPO-Find-系列负责人换帅，卓世杰接棒周意保主导-4-月旗舰发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhou Yibao, head of OPPO Find series products, announced that he would be moving to a new position in response to the company's internal rotation mechanism. Concurrently, Zhuo Shijie, former head of the imaging development department, officially took over as the head of OPPO Find series products and will serve as the official spokesperson for the Find flagship. 昨天，OPPO Find 系列产品负责人周意保发文宣布，将响应公司内部轮岗机制，奔赴新岗位。与此同时，原影像开发部部长卓世杰正式接任，出任 OPPO Find 系列产品负责人，并将担任 Find 旗舰官方发言人。

Zhou Yibao revealed in his statement that the Find X9 Ultra, set to be released in April this year, is "the proudest and most dedicated work" of his career. He specifically introduced his new partner, Zhuo Shijie, calling him "an expert who truly defines products from the underlying architecture" and someone who has long specialized in the field of imaging technology. 周意保在声明中透露，即将于今年 4 月发布的 Find X9 Ultra 是他「心里最骄傲、最用心的一代作品」。他特别介绍了新搭档卓世杰，称其为「真正从底层架构去定义产品的专家」，长期深耕影像技术领域。

After the personnel handover is complete, the two will jointly promote the pre-release work for the Find X9 Ultra in a "dual perspective" mode: 人事交接完成后，两人将以「双视角」模式共同推进 Find X9 Ultra 的预热工作：

    Zhou Yibao will focus on hands-on experience with the actual device and real-world imaging tests, emphasizing a popular interpretation of product highlights;

    Zhuo Shijie will focus on hardware parameter breakdown and underlying technology analysis, responsible for the initial release of core parameters and exclusive insider revelations.

item.title: OpenClaw 创始人确认 360 独家发现漏洞
item.guid: OpenClaw-创始人确认-360-独家发现漏洞
item.description:
According to a report by "Beijing Business Today," the 360 Security Cloud team recently received an official email from Peter Steinberger, founder of OpenClaw. In the email, Steinberger formally confirmed the OpenClaw Gateway WebSocket unauthenticated upgrade vulnerability exclusively discovered by the 360 team. 据《北京商报》报道，360 安全云团队近日收到 OpenClaw 创始人 Peter Steinberger 的官方邮件，Steinberger 在邮件中正式确认了由 360 团队独家发现的 OpenClaw Gateway WebSocket 无认证升级漏洞。

Currently, 360 has simultaneously reported this high-risk vulnerability to the National Vulnerability Database (CNVD), assisting in cutting off the source of risk across the entire network as quickly as possible. 目前，360 已将该高危漏洞同步报送至国家信息安全漏洞共享平台（CNVD），协助在全网范围内第一时间切断风险源头。

It is reported that the confirmed vulnerability is a zero-day (0Day) high-risk vulnerability. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability to silently bypass authentication via WebSocket, gain control of the agent gateway, which could then lead to severe security issues such as resource exhaustion or complete collapse of the target system. 据悉，此次确认的漏洞属于零日（0Day）高危漏洞。攻击者可利用该漏洞通过 WebSocket 静默绕过权限认证，获取智能体网关的控制权，进而可能导致目标系统出现资源耗尽或全面崩溃等严重安全问题。

item.title: 三星 Galaxy S26 本周支持 AirDrop
item.guid: 三星-Galaxy-S26-本周支持-AirDrop
item.description:
According to CNET, Samsung Galaxy S26 series phones will receive an update this week, gaining support for Apple AirDrop. Users will then be able to directly transfer photos and files between Samsung devices and iPhones, Macs, without the need for third-party applications. 据 CNET 报道，三星 Galaxy S26 系列手机将于本周推送更新，获得对苹果 AirDrop 的支持，用户届时可直接在三星设备与 iPhone、Mac 之间传输照片和文件，无需借助第三方应用。

This cross-platform interoperability was previously first implemented on the Google Pixel 10 series. Samsung stated that AirDrop compatibility will gradually expand to more Galaxy models later. As for domestic manufacturers, OPPO's upcoming X9 Ultra is also expected to support this feature. 这一跨平台互通能力此前已率先在 Google Pixel 10 系列上落地。三星表示，AirDrop 兼容功能后续将逐步扩展至更多 Galaxy 机型。国产厂商方面，OPPO 即将发布的 X9 Ultra 预计也将支持该功能。

item.title: 💡 马克·库班：AI Agent 将让员工每天少工作一小时
item.guid: 💡-马克·库班：AI-Agent-将让员工每天少工作一小时
item.description:
According to Business Insider, billionaire investor Mark Cuban posted on X that AI agents will help employees reduce their work time by one hour per day. 据《商业内幕》报道，亿万富翁投资人马克·库班（Mark Cuban）在 X 发文表示，AI 智能体将帮助员工每天减少一小时工作时间。

He believes that "smart big companies" should encourage employees to independently create and use AI agents to improve productivity, and reward them by shortening working hours—working one hour less per day while keeping salaries unchanged. "Reward people who get their work done day in and day out with more time," Cuban wrote. 他认为，「聪明的大公司」应鼓励员工自主创建并使用 AI 智能体提升生产效率，并以缩短工时作为奖励——在薪资不变的前提下，每天少工作一小时。「要用更多时间来奖励那些日复一日完成工作的人，」库班写道。

Cuban also stated on the same day that he is not an AI "doomsayer" and does not believe that the rise of AI will lead to widespread unemployment. 库班同日还表示，他并不是 AI「末日论者」，不认为 AI 的崛起会导致大规模失业。

He pointed out that over time, the same technological tools will eventually be available to everyone, and "those who adopt earliest, iterate fastest, and execute best will be the ultimate winners." He had previously also suggested that fresh graduates prioritize going to small and medium-sized enterprises to help them implement AI agents. 他指出，随着时间推移，相同的技术工具终将向所有人开放，「最早采用、迭代最快、执行最好的人，才是最终的赢家」。此前他也曾建议应届毕业生优先前往中小企业，帮助它们落地 AI 智能体。

item.title: 8499 元起，华为 Mate80 Pro Max 风驰版正式发布
item.guid: 8499-元起，华为-Mate80-Pro-Max-风驰版正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei held its Spring All-Scenario New Product Launch Event, officially introducing the Mate 80 Pro Max Fengchi Edition. Regarding pricing: the 16GB + 512GB version is priced at 8499 yuan, and the 16GB + 1TB version is priced at 9499 yuan. 昨天，华为举行春季全场景新品发布会，正式推出 Mate 80 Pro Max 风驰版。售价方面：16GB + 512GB 版售价 8499 元，16GB + 1TB 版售价 9499 元。

    Equipped with Kirin 9030 PRO chip;

    6.9-inch ultra-transparent Linglong screen, with a peak brightness of 8000nit;

    50MP wide-angle + telephoto, 40MP ultra-wide-angle lens, Red Maple primary color camera;

    Equipped with a Fengchi heat dissipation module, featuring a hidden, imperceptible air outlet design, and built-in bionic winged turbofans. The official claim is a 60% increase in airflow at the same noise level, and a 30% increase in heat dissipation efficiency at the same airflow.

    Built-in 6000mAh battery;

    All-metal body, with dual IP68 / IP69 waterproof certification.

Huawei also released several new wearable products at this launch event, including: Huawei WATCH Ultimate 2 Extraordinary Exploration in a new Wilderness Green color, priced at 7999 yuan; Huawei WATCH GT Runner 2, priced at 2588 yuan; and the Huawei Band 11 series, starting from 269 yuan. 华为还在本场发布会上发布了多款可穿戴新品，分别为：华为 WATCH Ultimate 2 非凡探索全新配色旷野绿，售价 7999 元；华为WATCH GT Runner 2，售价 2588 元；华为手环 11 系列，269 元起。

item.title: 鸿蒙智行八款车型焕新，尚界 Z7 预售 22.98 万元起
item.guid: 鸿蒙智行八款车型焕新，尚界-Z7-预售-22.98-万元起
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei's Spring All-Scenario New Product Launch Event was held in Changsha, where multiple models under Harmony Intelligent Mobility made their official debut and began pre-orders or refreshed listings. 昨日，华为春季全场景新品发布会在长沙举办，鸿蒙智行旗下多款车型正式亮相并开启预订或焕新上市。

Shangjie Z7 / Z7T: 尚界 Z7 / Z7T：

    All models come standard with Huawei's 896-line dual-optical path image-level LiDAR, Huawei Turing Platform, and Huawei Whale 800V high-voltage battery platform, with a CLTC pure electric range of up to 905km.

    Features a hatchback coupe design, offering 10 color options and a "Chasing Wind" sports kit, configured with 245mm front and 275mm rear "mandarin duck" tires.

    Pre-orders have officially begun, with starting pre-sale prices of 229,800 yuan and 239,800 yuan respectively.

AITO M6: 问界 M6：

    Body dimensions are 4960×1985×1736mm, with a wheelbase of 2950mm, and a drag coefficient as low as 0.239cd. All models come standard with the Huawei Turing Platform, and emergency wading depth can reach 700mm.

    The pure electric version is equipped with a smart front trunk of up to 202L, and the front dual zero-gravity seats support unfolding for rest; all models come standard with 896-line dual-optical path image-level LiDAR.

    Pre-orders are simultaneously open, with the extended-range version starting from 269,800 yuan and the pure electric version starting from 289,800 yuan.

Luxeed S9 / S9T: 享界 S9 / S9T：

    Added Star Rose Pink color, S9 adds Moonlight White color, with Nebula Red interior and exclusive luxury wheels also available.

    Equipped with Huawei Qiankun Smart Driving® ADS 4 Advanced Edition and an 896-line dual-optical path image-level LiDAR configuration.

    Suggested retail price starts from 319,800 yuan.

Luxeed R7 / New S7 / V9 智界 R7 / 新 S7 / V9

    Added "Dark Night Purple" and "Vibrant Orange" car colors and a reddish-brown interior, with a simultaneous upgrade to the Harmony ALPS Health Cockpit.

    All models can be equipped with 896-line dual-optical path image-level LiDAR, and the pure electric version can choose up to a 100kWh battery. The Luxeed R7 pure electric version has a drag coefficient of 0.217.

    The official suggested retail price for the Luxeed R7 with 896-line lidar configuration starts from 259,800 yuan, and the corresponding configuration for the new Luxeed S7 starts from 239,800 yuan.

AITO M7: 问界 M7：

    Adds Night Violet car color, paired with brand new 21-inch star-spoke wheels;

    The official suggested retail price for the 896-line lidar configuration starts from 309,800 yuan.

AITO M8: 问界 M8：

    Adds two new car colors, Azure Blue and Auspicious Red, paired with brand new 21-inch Yaoying sport wheels;

    Safety configuration upgraded to 896-line dual-path image-grade lidar, with an additional 3 high-precision solid-state lidars on the left and right sides, and simultaneous completion of chassis software and hardware upgrades;

    Launches Max extended-range long-endurance version, equipped with a 53.4kWh battery, CLTC pure electric range of 322km, and a comprehensive range of 1590km;

    The official suggested retail price for the 896-line lidar configuration starts from 369,800 yuan.

item.title: vivo X300 Ultra 影像技术揭晓，以「专业 V 单」重新定义移动影像
item.guid: vivo-X300-Ultra-影像技术揭晓，以「专业-V-单」重新定义移动影像
item.description:
Yesterday, vivo held an X series blueprint imaging technology communication meeting, officially revealing the imaging technology details of the vivo X300 Ultra. 昨天，vivo 举办了 X 系列蓝图影像技术沟通会，正式披露了 vivo X300 Ultra 的影像技术细节。

Equipped with a Zeiss triple camera system, continuing the classic "Great Trinity" concept of cameras: a 14mm 1/1.28-inch ultra-wide-angle lens with CIPA 6.0 stabilization, a 35mm LYTIA-901 1/1.12-inch humanistic documentary lens, and an 85mm Samsung HP0 telephoto lens with CIPA 7.0 stabilization.

Regarding teleconverters: 增距镜方面：

    The 2.35x equivalent 200mm teleconverter G2 is Zeiss APO certified, with CIPA 6.5 stabilization, and its weight and length are reduced to 73% and 86% respectively compared to the previous generation;

    The 4.7x equivalent 400mm teleconverter G2 Ultra internally uses 5 ultra-low dispersion glass elements and 1 aspherical glass element, with CIPA 4.5 stabilization.

Video capabilities: 视频能力：

    Full-focal-length 4K 120fps 10bit Log video recording, supports 10bit 422 APV professional video encoding, and adds full-link Log function, supporting rec709 color preview and custom 3D LUT import;

    Launches a new "Professional Video Mode", which reconstructs the interactive interface based on the control logic of professional cameras, equipped with a four-microphone array audio system and 6 major scene-based audio presets.

The vivo X300 Ultra will also feature the new "vivo Color Science", including five major modules: Blueprint Primary Color Camera, Blueprint Native Color, Ultra XDR, Personalized Style Matrix, and Blueprint Color Palette. vivo X300 Ultra 还将搭载全新的「vivo 色彩科学」，包括蓝图原色摄像头、蓝图原生色彩、Ultra XDR、个性化风格矩阵和蓝图调色盘五大模块。

item.title: 曝阿里将推出多款「养虾」硬件
item.guid: 曝阿里将推出多款「养虾」硬件
item.description:
According to Jiemian News and Blue Whale Technology, Alibaba is simultaneously advancing its strategic layout in two tracks: AI Agent hardware and chips. 据界面新闻和蓝鲸科技报道，阿里巴巴正在 AI Agent 硬件与芯片两条赛道同步推进布局。

At the hardware terminal level, Alibaba plans to launch two hardware products, JVS Book (laptop terminal) and JVS Box (mini host), both led by Alibaba Cloud's Wuying team for research and development. 在硬件终端层面，阿里计划推出 JVS Book（笔记本终端）与 JVS Box（迷你主机）两款硬件产品，均由阿里云无影团队主导研发。

    JVS Book focuses on mobile office scenarios, built on an OpenClaw-like architecture, and deeply integrated with the JVS Claw platform;

    JVS Box, on the other hand, is designed for desktop office use, positioned as a desktop AI Agent workstation, also adopting an OpenClaw-like architecture.

At the chip level, Alibaba DAMO Academy may today release important chip products at the 2026 XuanTie RISC-V Ecosystem Conference held in Shanghai. It is widely believed that this release directly addresses the current surging demand for AI Agent computing power. DAMO Academy previously released the industry's first server-grade RISC-V CPU at the same conference last year. 在芯片层面，阿里巴巴达摩院今天或将在上海举行的 2026 玄铁 RISC-V 生态大会上发布重要芯片产品，外界普遍认为此次发布直指当前爆发的 AI Agent 算力需求。达摩院去年曾在同一大会上发布业内首款服务器级 RISC-V CPU。

item.title: MiniMax 将 Coding Plan 升级为 Token Plan，支持全模态模型调用
item.guid: MiniMax-将-Coding-Plan-升级为-Token-Plan，支持全模态模型调用
item.description:
Yesterday, MiniMax announced a comprehensive upgrade of its Coding Plan to Token Plan, positioning it as "the world's first subscription plan supporting all-modal models." 昨天，MiniMax 宣布将旗下 Coding Plan 全面升级为 Token Plan，定位为「全球首个支持全模态模型的订阅计划」。

The new Token Plan adds multi-modal model calling support for Plus / Plus-Extreme Edition and higher-tier package users, covering Hailuo video model, Speech voice model, Music audio model, and Image generation model. The gifted quota for multi-modal models does not consume programming model usage, and calls within the package quota do not require additional payment. 新版 Token Plan 向 Plus / Plus-极速版及以上套餐用户新增了多模态模型的调用支持，覆盖 Hailuo 视频模型、Speech 语音模型、Music 音乐模型和 Image 图像生成模型。多模态模型的赠额不占用编程模型用量，套餐赠额内调用无需额外付费。

For professional developers and enterprise users with mass production needs, MiniMax also offers "Voice Resource Pack" and "Video Resource Pack" add-on options, supporting the flagship voice model Speech 2.8 and video models Hailuo 2.3 / 2.3-Fast. The official statement claims that this can save up to 20% in usage costs compared to individual calls. 对于有批量生产需求的专业开发者和企业用户，MiniMax 还推出「语音资源包」与「视频资源包」增购选项，支持旗舰语音模型 Speech 2.8 及视频模型 Hailuo 2.3 / 2.3-Fast，官方称相较单独调用可节省最多 20% 的使用成本。

item.title: 12 家平台被约谈，「内卷式」竞争首批违规问题曝光
item.guid: 12-家平台被约谈，「内卷式」竞争首批违规问题曝光
item.description:
According to The Paper, yesterday, the Beijing Municipal Market Supervision Bureau, in conjunction with the Municipal Commerce Bureau and the Municipal Culture and Tourism Bureau, interviewed 12 platforms including Ctrip, Qunar, Amap, JD.com, Taobao Flash Sale, and Meituan. They announced the first batch of issues in the rectification of "involutionary" competition among platforms and issued "Administrative Warning Letters" requiring rectification within a specified period. 据澎湃新闻报道，昨天北京市市场监管局联合市商务局、市文化和旅游局约谈携程、去哪儿网、高德、京东、淘宝闪购、美团等 12 家平台，通报平台「内卷式」竞争整治首批问题，并送达《行政告诫书》要求限期整改。

The problems are concentrated in four categories: unauthorized modification of merchant prices (Taobao Flash Sale reduced a merchant's 19.8 yuan package to an actual payment of 2.58 yuan), forcing the lowest price across the entire network and automatically matching prices (Ctrip's "Price Adjustment Assistant" has been ordered to be removed), expanded interpretation of "customer poaching" rules, and false advertising such as "ticket-grabbing acceleration packages." Qunar and JD.com were specifically named for having compliance management systems that exist in name only. 问题集中在四类：擅自修改商家价格（淘宝闪购将商家 19.8 元套餐压至实收 2.58 元）、强迫全网最低价并自动跟价（携程「调价助手」已被要求下架）、「切客」规则扩大化认定、以及「抢票加速包」等虚假宣传。去哪儿网和京东则因合规管理体系形同虚设被单独点名。

The three departments stated that in the next step, they will continue to deepen the comprehensive rectification of "involutionary" competition among platforms, continuously publicly report illegal and non-compliant issues, take legal measures against platforms that fail to rectify or violate regulations, and establish a multi-party consultation mechanism to promote the standardized and healthy development of the platform economy. 三部门表示，下一步将继续深化平台「内卷式」竞争综合整治，持续公开通报违法违规问题，对整改不力、顶风违规的平台依法采取措施，并建立多方协商机制，推动平台经济规范健康发展。

item.title: 寿司郎回应金枪鱼虫卵风波：未检出寄生虫
item.guid: 寿司郎回应金枪鱼虫卵风波：未检出寄生虫
item.description:
Yesterday, Sushiro issued an official statement, responding to and apologizing for the suspected parasite incident involving tuna products at its Beijing Mentougou store. 昨天，寿司郎发布官方声明，就北京门头沟店金枪鱼产品疑似寄生虫事件作出回应并致歉。

The incident originated on March 1st this year when a Beijing consumer, while dining at Sushiro's Mentougou Chang'an Tianjie store, discovered a foreign object suspected to be "parasite eggs" in the ordered tuna product. A complaint was subsequently posted on social media, attracting widespread attention. 事件起因于今年 3 月 1 日，一名北京消费者在寿司郎门头沟长安天街店用餐时，发现所点金枪鱼产品中存在疑似寄生虫「虫卵」的异物，随后在社交平台发帖投诉，引发关注。

Currently, the Market Supervision Administration has released the investigation results, indicating no parasites were detected, and the product complies with national food safety standards. 目前，市场监督管理局已公布调查结果，表明未检出寄生虫，符合国家食品安全标准要求。

Regarding ingredient handling, Sushiro stated in its announcement that its tuna ingredients undergo strict -50°C ultra-low temperature freezing during processing and transportation, meeting industry standards for parasite inactivation. 在食材处理方面，寿司郎在声明中表示，其金枪鱼食材在加工及运输环节严格执行 -50°C 超低温冷冻处理，满足寄生虫灭活的行业规范要求。

Despite the normal test results, Sushiro still apologized for the sensory discomfort and unpleasant experience caused to consumers during their meal and pledged to conduct self-inspection and service improvements. 尽管检测结果未见异常，寿司郎仍就消费者在用餐过程中产生的感官不适及不愉快体验表示歉意，并承诺将进行自查与服务改善。

item.title: 千问上线 AI 打车，一句话搞定选车、选地点、选时间
item.guid: 千问上线-AI-打车，一句话搞定选车、选地点、选时间
item.description:
Yesterday, Qianwen officially launched its ride-hailing capability, allowing users to complete operations such as selecting car models, adding waypoints, and scheduling appointments with a single natural language sentence: 昨天，千问正式上线打车能力，用户可通过一句自然语言完成选车型、添加途经点、预约时间等操作：

    Supports personalized requests: such as "a car with fresh air, price not exceeding 30 yuan," "smooth driving," "good service attitude," etc.;

    Understanding intentions in complex scenarios: for example, "Our family wants to go to Shichahai to watch the sunset, take a taxi, 6 people," the system can automatically determine the number of people and match a business car; "Go to the hospital, there's a patient in the car, need a steady old driver," Qianwen will prioritize recommending a car with smooth driving, and also supports sending a message to the driver, such as "open the windows for ventilation in advance";

    Waypoint selection: for example, saying "Help me get a taxi to West Lake Turtle Pond, and drop off a friend at Xixi Wetland North Gate on the way," Qianwen can automatically add waypoints; after the trip starts, it also supports temporary additions with a single sentence;

    Memory and reservation capabilities: After users provide their home and company addresses, they can directly say "Help me get a taxi home" or "Get a taxi to the company"; by saying "I get off work at 6:30 PM, help me book a car home," the system can automatically understand the time and complete the reservation.

item.title: 龚俊、任敏主演《家事法庭》明日开播
item.guid: 龚俊、任敏主演《家事法庭》明日开播
item.description:
According to China.com Entertainment, the TV series "Family Court" will air on CCTV-1's prime time slot starting tomorrow, with Tencent Video and iQiyi simultaneously premiering it across the entire network at 8 PM. 据中国网娱乐报道，电视剧《家事法庭》将于明天起在 CCTV-1 黄金档播出，腾讯视频、爱奇艺同步于 20 点全网首播。

The drama is supervised by Guan Hu, directed by Xie Dongshen, starring Gong Jun and Ren Min, with Huang Lu, Gao Xin, Han Yunyun, and others. The plot focuses on grassroots family courts, telling the story of young judge Shen Xiezhi (played by Gong Jun) and lawyer Qin Rui (played by Ren Min), among other legal professionals, jointly handling family cases such as marriage disputes and custody battles. 该剧由管虎监制，谢东燊执导，龚俊、任敏领衔主演，黄璐、高鑫、韩云云等主演，剧情聚焦基层家事法庭，讲述青年法官沈谢秩（龚俊饰）与律师秦睿（任敏饰）等法律从业者共同处理婚姻纠纷、抚养权争夺等家事案件的故事。

item.title: 7 部影片定档五一
item.guid: 7-部影片定档五一
item.description:
Yesterday, Taopiaopiao and Lighthouse Professional jointly announced that seven films have been officially scheduled for the 2026 May Day holiday, covering various genres such as comedy, animation, suspense, and war. 昨天，淘票票与灯塔专业版联合公布，2026 年五一档已有 7 部影片正式定档，涵盖喜剧、动画、悬疑、战争等多种类型。

    On April 30th, the classic sequel 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' will be released first, directed by David Frankel, with Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway returning to star, continuing the urban comedy style;

    May 1st will see the concentrated release of 5 films, including the drama-comedy 'A Thousand Gold for Nothing', the animated film 'Red Boy: King of the Flaming Mountains', and suspense films 'Extraordinary Witness', 'Horror Puppet', and 'Sea of Sin';

    On May 4th, the war-themed film 'Bloody Battle of Kunniu Mountain' will be the final release.
